message: We have obtained more than 390Gb files on our internal network, which contain employee files,law enforcement video,mail and various confidential documents such as contracts.Defiance,OhioCity in and the county seat of Defiance County, Ohio, United States • Defiance is a city in and the county seat of Defiance County, Ohio, United States, about 55 miles southwest of Toledo and 47 miles northeast of Fort Wayne, Indiana, in Ohio's northwestern corner. The population was 17,066 at the 2020 censusCity of Defiance631 Perry Street Defiance, Ohio 43512Phone: 419-784-2101https://www.facebook.com/cityofdefiance/50MB sample files:https://gofile.io/d/5lGY2F
